gaps.title: Jinja2 Template Injection Vulnerability
gaps.breaks: Malicious template content could allow arbitrary code execution or data extraction
gaps.scenario: An attacker submits a template with `{{ company.secrets }}` or `{% for x in range(1000000) %}` causing DoS or data breach
gaps.prompt: Write a test that attempts to inject Jinja2 syntax into template content fields, including loops, conditionals, and attribute access, to verify proper sanitization

gaps.title: Cache Invalidation Race Condition
gaps.breaks: Stale cached responses returned after template updates
gaps.scenario: Template version updated, but concurrent requests still receive old cached responses until cache expires
gaps.prompt: Write a test that simulates concurrent template updates and response generation requests to verify proper cache invalidation and no stale responses

gaps.title: A/B Test Contamination
gaps.breaks: A/B test variant assignment persists across tenant boundaries
gaps.scenario: Tenant A sees responses using a variant meant only for Tenant B due to shared cache keys or session state
gaps.prompt: Write a test that verifies A/B test variant isolation between different tenants, especially when templates are shared across pricing tiers

gaps.title: Version Conflict During Rollback
gaps.breaks: Partial template rollback leaves system in inconsistent state
gaps.scenario: During template rollback, a background job fails mid-process, leaving some references pointing to old versions and others to new
gaps.prompt: Write a test that simulates a failed template rollback operation and verifies system remains in consistent state with proper cleanup

gaps.title: Caching Memory Leak
gaps.breaks: Unbounded cache growth leads to performance degradation
gaps.scenario: Unique template combinations or tenant configurations cause cache to grow indefinitely without eviction policy
gaps.prompt: Write a test that generates numerous unique template variations and tenant configurations to verify cache has proper size limits and eviction policies

raw_response:
GAPS FOUND: 5

GAP 1
Severity: CRITICAL
Title: Jinja2 Template Injection Vulnerability
What breaks: Malicious template content could allow arbitrary code execution or data extraction
Real scenario: An attacker submits a template with `{{ company.secrets }}` or `{% for x in range(1000000) %}` causing DoS or data breach
AI agent prompt: Write a test that attempts to inject Jinja2 syntax into template content fields, including loops, conditionals, and attribute access, to verify proper sanitization

GAP 2
Severity: HIGH
Title: Cache Invalidation Race Condition
What breaks: Stale cached responses returned after template updates
Real scenario: Template version updated, but concurrent requests still receive old cached responses until cache expires
AI agent prompt: Write a test that simulates concurrent template updates and response generation requests to verify proper cache invalidation and no stale responses

GAP 3
Severity: HIGH
Title: A/B Test Contamination
What breaks: A/B test variant assignment persists across tenant boundaries
Real scenario: Tenant A sees responses using a variant meant only for Tenant B due to shared cache keys or session state
AI agent prompt: Write a test that verifies A/B test variant isolation between different tenants, especially when templates are shared across pricing tiers

GAP 4
Severity: MEDIUM
Title: Version Conflict During Rollback
What breaks: Partial template rollback leaves system in inconsistent state
Real scenario: During template rollback, a background job fails mid-process, leaving some references pointing to old versions and others to new
AI agent prompt: Write a test that simulates a failed template rollback operation and verifies system remains in consistent state with proper cleanup

GAP 5
Severity: MEDIUM
Title: Caching Memory Leak
What breaks: Unbounded cache growth leads to performance degradation
Real scenario: Unique template combinations or tenant configurations cause cache to grow indefinitely without eviction policy
AI agent prompt: Write a test that generates numerous unique template variations and tenant configurations to verify cache has proper size limits and eviction policies
